concerns.text: FR-001 mandates downloading BOTH 'Persona-Chat' and 'EmpatheticDialogues' datasets. Tasks T013-T017 only implement fetching 'HCI_P2'. The requirement to download and process the two specified datasets is completely missing from the task list.

FR-005 mandates re-running analysis with the 'LIWC-2015 Politeness Dictionary'. Task T030 explicitly implements 'textstat' or 'politeness' package instead, rejecting LIWC-2015. There is no task to implement the specific LIWC-2015 robustness check required by the spec.

FR-006 and US-3 require subgroup analysis by 'user age and gender'. The plan and tasks rely on HCI_P2, which the plan admits may lack these fields (Phase 0, Step 1). There is no task to verify the presence of these fields in the dataset or to handle the case where they are missing, risking the inability to fulfill the subgroup analysis requirement.

SC-003 requires measuring a convergence rate of '≥ 95% of fitted models converge'. Task T024 implements a fallback to 'fixed-effects ordinal regression' if CLMM fails. There is no task to track or report the specific convergence rate of the CLMM itself, as the fallback conflates 'successful execution' with 'model convergence', making the SC-003 metric unmeasurable.
